contract_summary: Put wrapper that decrements the users refcount on obj_depended, indicating that the dependency relationship from obj_dependent to obj_depended is being removed. Includes a sanity check (WARN_ON) for same pointer or type mismatch. After this call, obj_depended's refcount is decreased; if it reaches zero, the object may be freed. The caller must ensure that obj_depended is no longer accessed after the put.
